name: --group-candidates <json|@file|->
evidence: src/cli.ts parses --group-candidates; src/help.ts advertises CLI group expansion; node dist/cli.js --json --group-candidates @payload.json expands a more.groupCandidates payload.

name: invalid groupCandidates payload
evidence: src/cli.ts preserves SearchSessionsInputError code invalid_group_followup in JSON stderr; live transcript reports invalidField groupCandidates.fingerprint and a copy-ready --group-candidates @payload.json command.

name: --mode value typo
evidence: src/cli.ts suggests close resultsDisplayMode values; node dist/cli.js "auth token timeout" --mode canddiates --json suggests --mode candidates.

name: recommended FFF MCP release
evidence: src/fff-preflight.ts and scripts/postinstall.mjs now recommend v0.9.5; /home/ben/.local/bin/fff-mcp --version reports 0.9.5; npm run check:fff passes live smoke, multi_grep, and recall equivalence.

name: capabilities and sources without --json
evidence: src/help.ts now documents sources [--json] and capabilities [--json]; node dist/cli.js capabilities and node dist/cli.js sources both emit machine-readable JSON.
